title: System Settings
subtitle: Manage your general preferences, user profile, and password security.

general.title: General Preferences
general.subtitle: Configure the application interface language and visual theme.
general.languageDesc: Select the language used for the user interface.
general.themeDesc: Select a visual theme that is comfortable for your eyes.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal profile information.
profile.roleDesc: Your account role is managed by the system administrator.

password.title: Password Security
password.subtitle: Change your password regularly to maintain account security.
